name: task_list
description: List and filter structured tasks with flexible query options. Supports filtering by parent task, lifecycle states, priority levels, and assigned agent. Use include_subtree to recursively fetch all descendants of a parent task. Results are paginated via limit and offset.

parent_task_id.description: Filter to only return direct children of this parent task ID. Use null or omit for root-level tasks.

states.description: Filter tasks by one or more lifecycle states

priority.description: Filter tasks by one or more priority levels

agent_id.description: Filter tasks assigned to a specific agent

include_subtree.description: When true and parent_task_id is set, recursively include all descendants, not just direct children

limit.description: Maximum number of tasks to return

offset.description: Number of tasks to skip for pagination

examples.name: List subtasks of a parent task
